name: Escape Room Los Angeles
description: Award-winning escape room venue featuring 5 immersive themed rooms. From haunted mansions to spy adventures, our expert game masters craft unforgettable experiences for teams of 2-8 players.

name: Escape Quest Houston
description: Premier escape room experience with cutting-edge technology and intricate puzzles. Choose from fantasy quests, horror scenarios, and mystery investigations. Perfect for corporate team building.

name: Manhattan Mystery Rooms
description: NYC's most immersive escape room concept with 7 unique rooms. Each room tells a complete story with professional set design and live actor options available.

name: Escape Theory Miami
description: South Florida's premier escape room destination with exotic themes and challenging puzzles. Experience jungle temples, underwater labs, and mystery heists in luxurious settings.

name: Chicago Riddle Room
description: Chicago's original escape room with 6 distinctive themed rooms. Features progressive difficulty levels and family-friendly options alongside intense horror experiences.

name: Denver Escape Games
description: Mountain town mystery solving with 4 unique rooms featuring Colorado-themed adventures. Perfect for locals and tourists seeking outdoor-inspired indoor challenges.

name: Seattle Underground Mysteries
description: Unique escape room experience set in historic Seattle underground locations. Eight atmospheric rooms combining history with mind-bending puzzles and immersive storytelling.

name: Atlanta Escape Adventures
description: Georgia's largest escape room facility with 9 rooms spanning multiple difficulty levels. From beginner-friendly to expert-only challenges, something for everyone.

name: Columbus Quest Rooms
description: Mid-Ohio's premier escape room featuring sci-fi, fantasy, and thriller themed rooms. Professional game masters ensure puzzle clarity and maximum fun for all skill levels.

name: Las Vegas Cipher Rooms
description: Vegas' most luxurious escape room experience with 6 high-tech themed rooms. James Bond-style spy missions, ancient heist scenarios, and brain-teasing mysteries await.
